scope.title: Inventory CKC/PoseKit/Atelier non-Rust surfaces before migration
scope.base_scope: Find CKC, CastKit Codex, PoseKit, and Atelier surfaces that are currently not Rust, classify each surface, and identify Rust/native anchors that can replace or absorb the behavior.
acceptance_criteria: List each relevant non-Rust file or directory with path, language, evidence, and classification.
Identify likely original/test-app locations or state that none were found locally.
List Rust/native anchors already present for equivalent behavior.
Call out gaps where a non-Rust surface cannot be classified without original-app evidence.
Recommend the next MT candidates in a migration order.

subagents.assignment: Current Handshake product non-Rust surface scan in the hotfix worktree.
Original/test-app evidence scan across Handshake sibling directories and the hotfix worktree.

commands_planned: rg content searches for CKC/CastKit/PoseKit/Atelier terms
targeted file reads for candidate surfaces

original_app_evidence: actual original app not found locally; see inventory_artifact for preserved source anchors
next_mt_candidates: MT-002 original-app evidence recovery or parity-baseline decision

results: Initial MT-001.json, mt_index.json, and packet.json parsed successfully before inventory.
Product worktree status after MT scaffold still showed only inherited baseline dirty files.
Subagents reported read-only completion and no product edits.
git -C ../wtc-ckc-posekit-overhaul status --short --branch still shows only the inherited baseline dirty files.
just build-order-sync reported BUILD_ORDER.md already up to date.

risks.risk: Inventory misses renamed or indirect CKC/PoseKit surfaces.
risks.mitigation: Search both explicit names and domain terms such as pose, keypoint, comfy, image workflow, and Atelier.

risks.risk: Original-app evidence is not found and classifications become speculation.
risks.mitigation: Mark those surfaces INVESTIGATE and create a follow-up evidence MT instead of deleting or migrating blind.
Subagent prompts explicitly require read-only work; final verification checks product worktree status for no new changes beyond inherited baseline.

risks.risk: Large directories make searches slow or noisy.
risks.mitigation: Exclude .GOV, node_modules, target, build, dist, and artifact roots.

handoff.summary: Inventory completed. Non-Rust current-product surfaces are recorded in MT-001-inventory.json. Original legacy app files were not found locally; preserved Rust source anchors are the current parity evidence unless MT-002 locates the original app.
